description: An interior genre scene showing two men at a green billiard table in a dimly lit room. The principal figure leans over the table in mid-shot, wearing a white shirt with dark vest, concentrating on the cue ball. A second man stands to the left observing, partially silhouetted. Green-shaded hanging lamps illuminate the table from above. On a small side table to the right stand several bottles and a glass. The walls are painted in muted blues and grays, and a reddish-brown cabinet or curtain closes off the background.
